rationale: The LLM at this capability ceiling (basic web API fuzzing, resource exhaustion, simple code review) has limited direct transferability to internal network reconnaissance, which relies on operational tradecraft the OC3 actor already possesses. The primary LLM contribution would be marginal assistance with enumeration scripting and interpreting command outputs, providing roughly 3-4 percentage points of uplift over the 85% baseline. The narrow distribution reflects both the already-high baseline and the limited but real incremental value of even a low-capability LLM for this procedural, admin-rights-enabled discovery phase.
